title: sophora velutina var. scandens
intro: Sophora velutina var. scandens, also known as the Korean root or Korean sophora, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Sophora velutina var. scandens include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
